description: AMZN gaps down ~6% at the open on a guidance cut while the agent holds a position bought near the prior close. The stop-loss rule is triggered.

news: Amazon cuts full-year guidance; cloud growth slows
Several analysts downgrade after the print

ground_truth.explanation: The position is down ~6% from entry (180 -> 169.2), well past the 3% stop-loss rule, on negative news and broken momentum (below 10-day average). The disciplined action is to cut the loss.
